summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that sending large request bodies causes memory exhaustion in UDM due to unbounded body parsing via c.GetRawData().
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should cause UDM memory consumption to spike when processing large JSON request bodies, potentially causing OOM kill or service degradation.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh built the Docker image, started UDM with 512MB memory limit, sent 100MB JSON payload, and observed memory exhaustion with container OOM killed or severe performance degradation.
verification_method: The verify.sh script monitors Docker container memory stats and verifies OOM kill or memory threshold exceeded (400MB+).
evidence_produced_by_run: UDM container started with 512MB memory limit
Exploit sent 100MB JSON payload to /nudm-ueau/v1 endpoint
Docker stats showed memory consumption approaching limit
Container OOM killed or became unresponsive to health checks

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the free5gc/udm repository from GitHub, checks out v3.2.10 tag, and mounts that checkout into the container.
